title: cleisostoma micranthum
intro: Cleisostoma micranthum is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered Cleisostoma. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma micranthum include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of sore throats. The herbal preparations of Cleisostoma micranthum typically involve drying and processing the plant into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
